text:
Top 14 Competency Assessment Tools in 2026

The article presents a comprehensive overview of leading competency assessment platforms. 'Companies using skill assessments during hiring have seen a 30% increase in new hire performance.'

Top Tools Covered:
1. WeCP - Offers 200k+ technical questions, AI-powered test creation, and proctoring with 4.8/5 G2 rating ($240/month)
2. HackerEarth - Specializes in coding challenges and technical screening ($209-419/month)
3. HireVue - Video interview platform for soft skills evaluation ($35,000/month enterprise)
4. Harver - Customizable assessments for cognitive abilities and cultural fit ($5,000/year)
5. Codility - Coding challenge platform with pair programming tools ($1,200-5,000/year)
6. TestGorilla - Pre-built test library with adaptive testing ($75-115/month)
7. iMocha - AI-powered proctoring with domain-specific tests ($5,000/year)
8. Toggl Hire - Multi-level screening with video interviews ($20-469/month)
9. Mettl - Simulation-based assessments with real-time proctoring
10. HackerRank - AI-enhanced technical screening ($100-450/month)
11. Hogan Assessments - Leadership and personality evaluations ($80-1,500+)
12. TalentGuard - Competency management with gap analysis
13. SHL - Comprehensive competency library ($100-500 per assessment annually)
14. eSkill - Customizable assessments starting at $850

Market Trends: AI/machine learning integration, HR system compatibility, and increased emphasis on soft skills assessment.
